answer.text:
The context is insufficient to identify a project from the beginning of January 2023.

The earliest relevant memory is from 2023-02-09, when Jolene said she was working on an engineering project.

question: What kind of project was Jolene working on in the beginning of January 2023?
recall_markdown:
# Recall Context

Task: What kind of project was Jolene working on in the beginning of January 2023?
Repository: `locomo/conv-48`

## 1. Jolene in session_22

2023-08-26T17:35:30+00:00 — Jolene: Yeah, Deborah! We've been figuring out how to add these values into our projects. As an engineering student, I want to use my talents to do good and help solve important problems. I'm keen on coming up with new ideas and making things more efficient to make the world a better place. Going further, my mom stressed the value of helping others and that's something I want to keep in mind for my engineering projects.

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_dc38f00e0ae7eedc2d9b](codecairn://memory/memory_dc38f00e0ae7eedc2d9b)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 2. Jolene in session_17

2023-08-12T20:54:30+00:00 — Jolene: Working on a cool project now - a prototype that could revolutionize aerial surveillance. Can't wait to see the results!

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_9475339318402ced450a](codecairn://memory/memory_9475339318402ced450a)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 3. Jolene in session_13

2023-06-06T15:56:00+00:00 — Jolene: Hey Deborah! Long time no talk - I had lots of stuff going on. Remember the tough engineering project? I finally wrapped that up last month. Look at the result! [Image caption: a photo of a solar powered vehicle with a solar panel on the back]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_423ad59d89952a75ae0d](codecairn://memory/memory_423ad59d89952a75ae0d)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 4. Jolene in session_22

2023-08-26T17:38:30+00:00 — Jolene: The other is finding ways to supply clean water to those with limited access. Both align with my beliefs about sustainability and assisting those in need. I still have so much to figure out before beginning, but I'm up for the challenge.

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_300fb16be23f50f7227d](codecairn://memory/memory_300fb16be23f50f7227d)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 5. Jolene in session_12

2023-04-09T16:35:30+00:00 — Jolene: Thanks Deb! Your support means a lot. I'll keep you updated on the progress of the project.

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_27ff7a8018e8126745a6](codecairn://memory/memory_27ff7a8018e8126745a6)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 6. Jolene in session_4

2023-02-04T09:52:00+00:00 — Jolene: I want to keep working in engineering and continue to make a positive impact on communities in need by creating sustainable solutions. My goal is to contribute towards making the world a better place with my work.

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_ecbdac0804e413c551e3](codecairn://memory/memory_ecbdac0804e413c551e3)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 7. Jolene in session_5

2023-02-09T21:05:00+00:00 — Jolene: I really accomplished something with my engineering project - I came up with some neat solutions and I'm really excited about it.

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_9744485cb5257213133d](codecairn://memory/memory_9744485cb5257213133d)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 8. Jolene in session_7

2023-02-25T16:55:00+00:00 — Jolene: Yep, teaming up for these projects feels great! We get each other's struggles and both love it. [Image caption: a photo of a group of men standing in front of a building]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_1c452431875c74b59e4c](codecairn://memory/memory_1c452431875c74b59e4c)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 9. Jolene in session_21

2023-08-24T09:34:30+00:00 — Jolene: Wow, Deb, sounds great! Glad you got to connect with yourself and nature. That's my own way to relax. What are your thoughts on life now? [Image caption: a photo of a man bending over on a blanket in the grass]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_49c7d8a0d5ba9cf9a4d7](codecairn://memory/memory_49c7d8a0d5ba9cf9a4d7)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 10. Deborah in session_22

2023-08-26T17:36:00+00:00 — Deborah: When our work ties into our values, it becomes more meaningful. What goals or ideas do you have for incorporating those values into your future projects?

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_7bcd4a1d0a199136c1a0](codecairn://memory/memory_7bcd4a1d0a199136c1a0)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 11. Jolene in session_16

2023-08-01T09:26:30+00:00 — Jolene: Hey Debs! Congrats on your project for the community! As for me, life's been a rollercoaster lately. Last week, I had a huge setback with my project. I put in so much work and it all crashed and I lost everything. SO frustrating and depressing.

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_3706a4542664b4a08fb1](codecairn://memory/memory_3706a4542664b4a08fb1)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 12. Jolene in session_19

2023-08-19T01:00:30+00:00 — Jolene: Sounds lovely! Nature can be calming. What makes this bench special to you? [Image caption: a photo of a bench in a park with a tree in the background]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_5cf056755cefed72afd5](codecairn://memory/memory_5cf056755cefed72afd5)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 13. Deborah in session_2

2023-01-27T09:57:00+00:00 — Deborah: Yeah, Jolene. She'd sit there every night with a book and a smile, reading was one of her hobbies. It was one of her favorite places in the house. [Image caption: a photo of a view of the sky from an airplane window]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_180d9fcf5cdb51195e79](codecairn://memory/memory_180d9fcf5cdb51195e79)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 14. Deborah in session_14

2023-06-26T09:23:00+00:00 — Deborah: Awesome, Jolene! I'm really glad your project worked out.

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_6f5a5f8bdf7be5028fac](codecairn://memory/memory_6f5a5f8bdf7be5028fac)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 15. Deborah in session_16

2023-08-01T09:32:00+00:00 — Deborah: In the meantime, check out this great place for yoga. [Image caption: a photo of a room with a lot of yoga mats on the floor]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_189e02a9d6251a7afc6e](codecairn://memory/memory_189e02a9d6251a7afc6e)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 16. Deborah in session_7

2023-02-25T16:54:30+00:00 — Deborah: Wow, your relationship started from a strong friendship. Do you still enjoy working on engineering projects together?

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_d866b2c9bff27c5c91d3](codecairn://memory/memory_d866b2c9bff27c5c91d3)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 17. Deborah in session_21

2023-08-24T09:41:00+00:00 — Deborah: Come on! The journey's as important as the destination. Take time for yourself and find joy in it. We believe in you! [Image caption: a photo of a field of sunflowers with a sunset in the background]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_a69f7513ebb019460660](codecairn://memory/memory_a69f7513ebb019460660)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 18. Jolene in session_12

2023-04-09T16:34:30+00:00 — Jolene: Just so you know, I've been working on a big project lately - it's been tough but also really cool to watch it take shape. Can't wait to see the final result!

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_33ade3c07b4d2e9763a6](codecairn://memory/memory_33ade3c07b4d2e9763a6)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 19. Jolene in session_21

2023-08-24T09:41:30+00:00 — Jolene: Yeah, you're right! I'll take your advice and find joy on the way. Cheers for the support! [Image caption: a photo of a city skyline at sunset with a body of water]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_da6998b989112e465d33](codecairn://memory/memory_da6998b989112e465d33)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 20. Jolene in session_28

2023-09-15T15:16:30+00:00 — Jolene: I like to create my own serene yoga space with candles and oils for extra chill vibes. Also, we tried a new style of meditation in Thailand - with flowers. [Image caption: a photography of a couple of towels sitting on top of a table]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_19a4a1f412529136ea5e](codecairn://memory/memory_19a4a1f412529136ea5e)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)
